ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb where the business is located */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the business */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* The date the business was established */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the business */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the business */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the business's social media profiles */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* An additional contact email */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business is featured on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_business_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_type_id") REFERENCES business_types ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "business_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business type the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_subcategories_business_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_type_id") REFERENCES business_types ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_vettings" (
  "veting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vetting */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being vetted */,
  "veting_name" TEXT /* Name of the vetting (e.g., vegan-friendly, vegan-owned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vetting */,
  "vetting_date" TEXT /* Date when the vetting was performed */,
  "vetting_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or entity that performed the vetting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_vettings_vetting_by FOREIGN KEY ("vetting_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_vettings_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* The reason for flagging the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the business as a favorite */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business marked as a favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date the business was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business hour entry */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the hours are for */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the business */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the business */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_hours_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription entry */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the subscription is for */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ends */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subscription is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
